headline: CoStar Group (CSGP) Is Down 8.3% After Pledging $1.5 Billion Buyback And Refocusing On Core CRE
summary: In recent months, CoStar Group has responded to activist investor pressure by committing to a US$1.50 billion share repurchase program, tightening investment in its residential initiatives, and re-emphasizing its core commercial real estate data and marketplace operations. This shift toward stricter capital allocation and governance, alongside the wind-down of a proxy contest, highlights how investor scrutiny is reshaping CoStar’s balance between growth spending and profitability...
